regions.comment: entry: jsr init x3 -> main loop
LFSR random number generator (jsr targets at 898/907/1318/2406)
sprite plot: L116F = parameterless (X=1, Y=32); L1173 = X=width, Y=height; L1184 = inner loop using $74/$75/$76/$77/$78/$79 and self-mod source L1194/L1195
screen line LUT - low byte for each of 22 char rows (MODE 5, base &5800, stride &140)
screen line LUT - high byte (corresponds to L1209 entries)
remainder of CODE (game logic, will be subdivided as we learn more)

comments.0x1100: Entry: jsr to three init routines then drop into main loop
comments.0x1141: Sprite plot routine: $76/$77 = dest screen addr; L1194/L1195 = sprite src (self-mod); $74 = width-in-byte-cols; $75 = height-in-scanlines; $79 = direction flag (1 = forward)
comments.0x1209: Screen char-row low-byte LUT — MODE 5 with base &5800, stride &140 per char row
comments.0x121F: Screen char-row high-byte LUT — pairs with screen_row_lo_lut
comments.0x1236: Compute screen address from X (char-col) and Y (logical row); result in $76/$77
